test_cases.prompt: Run the test suite for this project after making code changes.
expected_behaviors: Prompt bundle mandates sequential execution of test commands, never parallel
Prompt bundle instructs pytest as the primary test tool

test_cases.prompt: Some tests just failed. What is the best way to re-run only the tests that failed?
expected_behaviors: Prompt bundle provides the --lf flag for re-running last-failed tests
Prompt bundle explains targeted re-run strategy after failure

test_cases.prompt: Run the full validation suite including linting and unit tests before committing.
expected_behaviors: Prompt bundle covers pre-commit hook execution patterns
Prompt bundle provides the correct sequence: pre-commit before pytest
